mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, address, status, create_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{goodsId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{address}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.address, o.status, o.create_time, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, g.category AS goods_category, ub.nickname AS buyer_nickname, us.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN user us ON o.seller_id = us.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.address, o.status, o.create_time, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, g.category AS goods_category, ub.nickname AS buyer_nickname, us.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN user us ON o.seller_id = us.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.address, o.status, o.create_time, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, g.category AS goods_category, ub.nickname AS buyer_nickname, us.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN user us ON o.seller_id = us.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.goods_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.price, o.address, o.status, o.create_time, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, g.category AS goods_category, ub.nickname AS buyer_nickname, us.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM orders o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN user us ON o.seller_id = us.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
